sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74464" key="o)pisqe/nar" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπισθέναρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾰρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n74464.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">the back of the hand,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:143" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.143</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:144" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">144</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:9:126" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.126</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
